title: Light Pink Confetti Hearts | Sprinkle Confetti | Romantic Pink Table Decoration for Anniversary, Valentines or Weddings
features: Set the scene for a heartfelt celebration with Pink, White or Red Heart Confetti.
This pack of tissue paper confetti features heart cut-outs in a romantic shade of pink, white or red.
Sprinkle confetti on your tables to fill gaps and provide depth to table arrangements.
Colour: light pink. Size approx. 1.6 x 1.6 cm. Material: Tissue paper. Pack contains approx. 15g of confetti.
